Author: GitHub
Title: GitHub Copilot CLI solved my issues so I could practice singing
Description:
Stop wasting time on manual dependency updates and let AI do the work. The GitHub Copilot CLI makes repository maintenance fast, easy, and completely cross-platform. See how saving time on the boring stuff gives you more room to do what you love. Drop a comment and tell us what you'd do with your saved time!
